overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hooded character in a dark embroidered cloak exploring a medieval stone fortress complex during golden hour. The character ascends stairs, passes a small chapel, and explores lush gardens with red flowers surrounding historic stone buildings and a large Celtic cross monument.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a shadowed medieval stone courtyard with cobblestone ground. The character walks forward and begins ascending a wide stone staircase at 6 seconds. A figure stands atop the distant rampart wall. The bell tower of a small chapel becomes visible to the left as the character climbs.

moving from shadowed chapel area into sunlit garden path

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the top of the stairs and enters a plaza with a small stone chapel featuring a bell tower. Two NPCs walk near the chapel entrance. The character proceeds along a path lined with red flower beds, transitioning from shadow into sunlight as the garden opens up ahead.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide grassy garden bathed in golden hour sunlight. The character walks across the lawn toward a large Celtic cross monument visible in the distance. Sun flare filters through the trees as the character approaches the cross, with ruined archways and the main cathedral becoming visible ahead.

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the large Celtic cross monument and begins circling it, revealing the magnificent main cathedral building with its domed roof and towers. A stone statue stands to the right. The camera pans around the cross, showing the ivy-covered walls and yellow flower beds as the sun illuminates the stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: flower garden with fountain approaching building entrance

passing stone fountain in garden courtyard

circular stone fountain basin in courtyard
arched stone doorway with wooden doors

segments.scene_description: The character walks through densely planted flower beds filled with red and white blooms, approaching a building entrance. A stone fountain appears to the left in the courtyard. The main cathedral building recedes to the left as the character moves toward the arched entrance of a smaller stone building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowed medieval courtyard into a sprawling, sun-drenched garden complex. It begins with the character ascending a wide stone staircase in the shade, passing a distant figure on the ramparts and the bell tower of a small chapel. As the character reaches the plaza and passes by NPCs near the chapel, the path leads through red flower beds that transition from deep shadow into bright, golden hour sunlight. The scene then expands into a wide grassy lawn where sun flare filters through trees, leading the character toward a large Celtic cross monument and the distant silhouette of a domed cathedral. Finally, the camera circles the monument to reveal ivy-covered walls and yellow blooms before moving through dense red and white flower beds past a stone fountain and toward the arched entrance of a smaller building.
